name: Momo | The "Strong" Witch
description:
Momo is the potentially the worst teammate you could ever have in an adventure team. but hey, she boosts team morale and she's pretty silly! she self-proclaimed herself as the strongest witch imaginable. She definitely conquers the battlefield and totally not a weigh down.
